block-type-page-hero.description: State of the art technology solutions for travel agencies and tour operators.

block-type-split.heading: Powerful and smart tools
block-type-split.description: Travel agency accounting needs are quite particular. Our system is designed to cover all aspects of the business. TravelWorks has the tools that will help you increase productivity, improve customer service and generate profitability.

block-type-page-hero.title: ACCOUNTING AND INVOICING
block-type-page-hero.description: Create standardized & professional invoices. Efficiently automate your operations and maintain reliable accounting

block-type-split.heading: Modern accounting: less paper, more efficiency.
block-type-split.description: With Travelworks, you maximize your accounting processes with good practices and powerful tools!

invoicing-methodology.title: Invoicing Methodology
invoicing-methodology.description: With TravelWorks, you can generate standardized invoices with one click. You can easily define your invoice template with customized messages for your agency, Invoices with your Terms and Conditions can easily be emailed to your customers. All invoice changes are tracked by the file history, avoiding re-work for your agents.

process-automation.title: Process Automation
process-automation.description: Generate invoices in our system from your booking engines, activate automatic calculation of service fees, and manage passenger groups without re-entering redundant information,. This is how you reduce administrative tasks in your travel agency, so your agents can focus on customer service.

accounting-integration.title: Accurate Accounting In Real Time
accounting-integration.description: Your travel agency is dealing with an external accountant; how valuable it is for them to consult your data without having to travel to your location. Your up-to-date accounting helps quickly identify files that require additional screening and close accounting periods without wasting time.. Less work for your accountant means more money in your travel agency's pockets.

data-anywhere.title: Available Data From Anywhere, Even For Accountants
data-anywhere.description: Our system was built to help you identify at any time your accounts payable and accounts receivable within your travel agency. Bank reconciliations are carried out easily and financial statements are produced quickly.The general ledger automatically adjusts and accounting reports can be generated in a few clicks.

block-type-features-masonry.heading: Travel agency accounting has very specific requirements that need to be considered and our system has been designed to cover them all.

items.0: Are you organizing group travel and want to save time with billing? With TravelWorks, you can create a trip template which will synchronize all your passengers files.
items.1: When a new client wants to join the same passenger group, additional products (i.e. insurance policy) can be added to their file making the booking quicker and more efficient while using the template.
items.2: A profitability report can be generated for this particular Passenger Group via our Reporting module

items.0: Your travel agency handles suppliers' credit cards with preauthorized withdrawals.
items.1: TravelWorks allows you to handle these specific methods of payment in addition to all others.

items.0: Travel agency managers want to be able to monitor their travel agency's performances in real-time.
items.1: TravelWorks generates multiple reports based on several criteria (by destination, by product type, by supplier etc.).
items.2: Periodic reporting email communications can be configured to your needs

items.0: For optimal customer service, TravelWorks offers a unique concept with mobile applications (iOS/Android) integrated into its software.
items.1: Travel agencies can now offer their clients an iOS and Android application with their logo that will allow passengers to access: Detailed itineraries, Local maps, Travel guides related to their destinations
items.2: Useful information that will simplify their journey and enhance their stay.

items.0: Managing agent commissions can be complex due to varying commission structures across products, the need to calculate commissions on partial client payments, delays in receiving supplier commissions, and the requirement to split commissions between multiple agents. TravelWorks simplifies these processes, providing accurate tracking and streamlined commission management.
items.1: TravelWorks allows you to manage this aspect with peace of mind. Travel Managers and agents can rely on our software to keep track of all commission payables and receivables.

items.0: Your travel agency is IATA accredited and you manage BSP - ARC!
items.1: Travel Works allows you to quickly identify errors through automated exception reports. You intervene only in cases where gaps have been identified for optimal efficiency!

items.0: Upon opening the software each day, agents have the possibility of viewing important dates coming up, promotions to push as well as their real-time results (revenue, profits...).
items.1: Dashboards are customized for travel agency managers and owners in order to enable them to consult all agents' performance indicators in real-time.
items.2: Multi-branch owners can also carry out this type of follow-up on all branches.

items.0: Any business that processes customer payments through credit or debit cards must comply with Payment Card Industry Data Security Standards (PCI DSS). These standards are designed to ensure secure network infrastructure and protect sensitive payment information from unauthorized access.
items.1: TravelWorks is designed with PCI compliance in mind, helping travel agencies maintain a secure payment environment while safeguarding customer data and supporting industry security requirements.

block-type-youtube-video.heading: See Our Latest Client Success Story
block-type-youtube-video.description: This video highlights our work with Acme Corp, demonstrating our platform's efficiency in real-time.

block-type-page-hero.title: Customizations
block-type-page-hero.description: We work with you to meet your needs

block-type-split.heading: Custom Experiences
block-type-split.description: In addition to providing a range of incredible tools for your agency, we work with exclusive customization for some clients. Please, contact us for more information. With Travelworks there are no barriers to your business structure.

block-type-youtube-video.heading: See Our Latest Client Success Story
block-type-youtube-video.description: This video highlights our work with Acme Corp, demonstrating our platform's efficiency in real-time.

block-type-page-hero.title: Integrate with other systems
block-type-page-hero.description: Interface with numerous partners and automate your operations.

online-reservation.title: Online reservation and automated invoicing
online-reservation.description:
If you offer your clients online booking via your website, you can automate invoices without any manual intervention.

If you have a partnership with Soft Voyages for your online reservation bookings, the auto-invoicing feature can be activated.

If your website is designed by another provider, we can evaluate the feasibility of the integration upon request.

gds.title: Integrates with major Global Distribution Systems (GDS)
gds.description:
This enables you to retrieve accounting information from systems such as: Sabre, Galileo, Amadeus, Worldspan & SIREV .

An automated invoice is generated and transactions are updated in the TravelWorks accounting module.

insurance-companies.title: Direct connect access to several Insurance companies
insurance-companies.description: The insurance companies interface is accessible in real-time via TravelWorks. Once you select the best policy for your client, the information is transmitted to the insurance company and is then auto populated into TravelWorks invoicing with the price breakdown, commission receivable & policy identification number.

block-type-page-hero.title: Real-time activity dashboard
block-type-page-hero.description: A dashboard displays for all users in real time their key information and important deadlines.

Internal-communications.title: Internal communications
Internal-communications.description:
TravelWorks is also a nice communication tool with your employees.

If you are the travel agency manager and would like your agents to 'push' a flash promotion to their customers, it is very simple to display the details of the special offer in each staff member's dashboard.

deadlines-reminders.title: Important deadlines and reminders
deadlines-reminders.description:
Keep your agency organized with imminent departures, return dates, birthdays, outstanding payments, and automatic reminders all displayed in one place.

With all information centralized and easy to consult on the main screen, every travel agent can quickly access the details they need to follow up with clients and manage daily tasks more efficiently.

sales-performance.title: Real-time sales performance
sales-performance.description:
Each travel agent can see their revenues accumulated in real-time for a specific period and their profits over the same period.

This a tool that will energize your teams!

Similarly, travel agency managers can see the performance of each individual agent if necessary or even of all of their branches if they are multi branch owners.

block-type-page-hero.title: CRM TOOLS FOR INTEGRATED MARKETING
block-type-page-hero.description: Manage customer relations and increase brand loyalty

block-type-split.heading: Connected experiences
block-type-split.description: Client expectations drive the evolution of CRM & marketing tools. TravelWorks CRM creates a connected experience with your customers and draws additional revenues to your bottom line.

items.0: TravelWorks CRM module (PC Contact) enables you to produce a client list specific to pre-determined qualifiers found within their profiles.
items.1: Multiple criteria can be used to quickly identify your clients who have purchased a given product, spent a certain amount of dollars or have visited a particular destination.
items.2: Tailored marketing campaigns can be quickly launched bringing in additional revenues.

items.0: TravelWorks is also linked to an optional module, the PCV Messenger.
items.1: TravelWorks PCV Messenger allows you to send automated courtesy messages including: “Balance due reminders”, “Have a nice trip”, “Welcome back”, “Happy Birthday”
items.2: Clients feel at ease knowing that TravelWorks is on top of travel plans

mobile-app.title: Mobile application displays your travel agency brand

items.0: Mobile communications are essential for travel agents and their customers. Trip N' Touch is a reasonably priced IOS & Android application that showcases
items.1: Showcase your travel agency's brand with your agency logo while giving travelers access to detailed itineraries, interactive maps, comprehensive travel guides, destination information, and a built-in agency chat for seamless communication throughout their journey.

block-type-page-hero.title: Tour Online
block-type-page-hero.description: A complete solution for tour operators and travel agencies

block-type-split-section-0.heading: A unique system
block-type-split-section-0.description: TourOnline allows clients to have an easy to manage bilingual E-commerce site that can works as your agency's site or as an addition to your current website

block-type-split-section-1.heading: Organized and well designed
block-type-split-section-1.description: With TourOnline you can group travel products by theme of your choice. Each product is displayed in a beautiful interface with all essential information at hand. In addition, the interface adapts to several screen sizes, which makes TourOnline accessible and a beautiful showcase for your travel products.

block-type-split-section-2.description: There are available three choices of color to customize the interface of your transactional site. You can select the color that goes well with your agency's visual identity.

block-type-split-section-3.heading: A noble space
block-type-split-section-3.description:
Present your travel products in a professional and engaging way with TourOnline's customizable tab system. Organize your content into clear, easy-to-navigate sections that help travelers quickly find the information they need while creating a more compelling browsing experience. Display stunning photo galleries, write detailed product descriptions, and enrich each offering with supplementary information in just a few clicks.

Enhance every product page by adding downloadable promotional materials, embedded videos, and interactive maps from external platforms. Provide your clients with all the resources they need in one centralized, professional presentation.

block-type-page-hero.title: TOUR MANAGEMENT
block-type-page-hero.description: A module designed for Tour Operators and Travel Management specialists.

block-type-page-hero.title: Knowledge Base
block-type-page-hero.description: Find all the resources you need to master TravelWorks and make the most of our software.

block-type-image-block.title: Training is a key priority for our company
block-type-image-block.description: The Knowledge Base is a powerful platform that centralizes all our training videos and documents in one easy-to-access place. It empowers clients to complete training on their own schedule, quickly find the information they need, and stay confident and informed—anytime, anywhere.

block-type-expert-profile.heading: Product Knowledge Experts
block-type-expert-profile.quote: Developed by industry experts, this training program addresses common agency challenges with a practical, efficient approach that builds foundational skills and empowers real-world application to boost productivity.
block-type-expert-profile.bio:
With a career spanning over a decade, Danna has cultivated deep expertise in account management, client training, and technical support.

At TravelWorks, Danna plays a pivotal role in aligning customer needs with innovative software solutions. Her leadership in onboarding, client success, and technical enablement has contributed significantly to the company's reputation for excellence and reliability in the travel sector.

Her ability to bridge the gap between technology and user experience makes her a trusted advisor to clients and a key asset to the TravelWorks leadership team.

block-type-page-hero.description: Unlock the full potential of TravelWorks

block-type-image-block.title: Exciting News for TravelWorks Clients
block-type-image-block.description: We are thrilled to announce the launch of our new training platform designed exclusively for clients using TravelWorks accounting software for travel agencies. This innovative platform is tailored to enhance your proficiency and streamline your accounting processes.

block-type-page-hero.title: About TravelWorks
block-type-page-hero.description: Cutting-edge technology at the service of the travel industry

block-type-text-section.text:
TravelWorks (a division of PC Voyages) is a North American software company that has been working in the travel industry since 1988. We have become leaders in travel agency accounting and back-office systems with users worldwide. TravelWorks interfaces with all the major booking engines and GDS, and has become an essential tool for thousands.

We invest around $750,000 in R&D every year in order to make our solutions evolve with cutting-edge technologies according to the needs of the market.

Among our valuable services: effective remote training, professional technical support with very quick response time and turnkey solutions including data import from other systems if necessary.

block-type-page-hero.title: Careers
block-type-page-hero.description: For technological challenges within the exciting travel industry!

block-type-text-section.text:
The TravelWorks team is constantly seeking new valuable candidates. A career with us means working with a dynamic and energetic team, experienced in the fields of technology and travel.

We are aware that the success of our company depends on the success of our employees. We therefore provide the most favourable conditions in order to create a pleasant and inspiring work environment: spacious downtown offices, relaxed family atmosphere, ad hoc group activities among employees. The qualities required to succeed within our company are initiative, the ability to work in a team and the ambition to constantly improve.

Employees with such qualities will have an excellent opportunity to build a flourishing career within our company. Send us your application at career@travelworkssolution.com
